subject: [dawn][d3d] Support BGLArraySize in D3D11 and D3D12
text:
Change has been successfully rebased and submitted as 5d172623486dad63076357e4a4d8410ce6844f59

11 is the latest approved patch-set.
The change was submitted with unreviewed changes in the following files:

```
The name of the file: src/dawn/tests/end2end/BindingArrayTests.cpp
Insertions: 6, Deletions: 4.

@@ -37,8 +37,9 @@
     void SetUp() override {
         DawnTest::SetUp();
 
-        // TODO(411573959) Fails using WARP but not on real hardware. WARP 10.0.19031.4355 samples
-        // the wrong textures when indexing while WARP 1.0.12.0 fails pipeline creation.
+        // TODO(https://issues.chromium.org/411573959) Fails using WARP but not on real hardware.
+        // WARP 10.0.19031.4355 samples the wrong textures when indexing while WARP 1.0.12.0 fails
+        // pipeline creation.
         DAWN_SUPPRESS_TEST_IF(IsD3D12() && IsWARP());
     }
 
@@ -114,8 +115,9 @@
     // Compat should disallow dynamically uniform indexing of binding_array of textures.
     DAWN_TEST_UNSUPPORTED_IF(IsCompatibilityMode());
 
-    // TODO(425328998): D3D11 exposes core when FXC cannot support core's uniform indexing of
-    // binding_array<texture*>. We should make D3D11 expose only compat by default.
+    // TODO(https://issues.chromium.org/425328998): D3D11 exposes core when FXC cannot support
+    // core's uniform indexing of binding_array<texture*>. We should make D3D11 expose only compat
+    // by default.
     DAWN_SUPPRESS_TEST_IF(IsD3D11());
 
     // Make the test pipeline
```
